title: aita for telling my friend i don't care about her relationship?
text: i made an account just for this, also i apologize for the weird formatting (i’m on mobile lol.) i (18f) have been good friends with a girl (19f) who we will call emily. emily has been in a very shitty relationship for about 4-5 months. it seems like every week she calls me sobbing telling me how her boyfriend is being an asshole and how their relationship is toxic. i constantly have to be the therapist friend and listen to her vent about her stupid bastard of a boyfriend and it’s getting annoying. despite the fact that i tell her to break up with him, a day after she complains that he’s a bad boyfriend, she’s all over him, kissing him and telling him that she loves him. yesterday i was doing my daily workout. i always turn my phone off and use my t.v for music since i have a speaker and it’s louder. after about 1 hour, i finished and took a shower. when i got out and turned my phone on, i was shocked to see like 40 text messages and 10 missed calls. they were from emily. i read them and to my “surprise” she was crying about her stupid boyfriend. i called her back and when she answered she started screaming at me. telling me that she needed me and that i was ignoring her messages and calls. i was really pissed off at this point because she had been treating me like her therapist. i told her that i didn’t care about her shitty relationship and if she hates her boyfriend so much why doesn’t she leave him. i told her if she had an ounce of self respect and knew her worth, she wouldn’t be staying with him. there was a few seconds of silence before she started sobbing, calling me a bad friend and a bitter bitch. she told me i was a jealous whore and that she was done being my friend. she hung up me and i’ve been thinking about it ever since. maybe i was too harsh? i feel bad for telling her she had no self respect. so aita?

storyboard.content: I (18F) have been good friends with Emily (19F). Emily has been in a very shitty relationship for about 4-5 months.

It seems like every week Emily calls me sobbing, telling me how her boyfriend is being an asshole and how their relationship is toxic. I constantly have to be the therapist friend and listen to her vent.
Despite the fact that I tell her to break up with him, a day after she complains he's a bad boyfriend, she's all over him, kissing him and telling him that she loves him.
Yesterday I was doing my daily workout. I always turn my phone off and use my TV for music. After about an hour, I finished and took a shower.

When I got out and turned my phone on, I saw about 40 text messages and 10 missed calls from Emily. When I called her back, she started screaming at me, telling me I was ignoring her messages and calls.

I told her that I didn't care about her shitty relationship and if she hates her boyfriend so much, why doesn't she leave him. I told her if she had an ounce of self-respect and knew her worth, she wouldn't be staying with him.
I was really pissed off at that point because she had been treating me like her therapist for months.
There was a few seconds of silence before she started sobbing, calling me a bad friend and a bitter bitch. She told me I was a jealous whore and that she was done being my friend. She hung up on me.
